title: Senior Doctor - Torrent Pharmaceuticals - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Torrent Pharmaceuticals - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
